headline: Religious enforcement raids target 450 private premises in 2024
context: State religious enforcement officers conducted 450 raids on private premises in 2024 investigating khalwat and other moral offences.

cards.big: 450 private premises raided by religious enforcement officers in 2024
cards.sub: Khalwat raids involve entering private residences, often at night

cards.big: State syariah enactments grant enforcement officers entry powers for moral offences
cards.sub: Article 13 protection of property and Article 5 privacy tensions unresolved

cards.big: Suhakam questioned constitutionality of warrantless religious enforcement raids
cards.sub: Privacy rights in private residence should be protected regardless of religion

cards.big: 78% of those raided were couples aged 20-35 in rented accommodation
cards.sub: Young adults disproportionately targeted by moral policing operations

cards.big: 450 raids on private homes to police morality is surveillance of intimacy
Federal Territories Islamic Department conducted 156 of 450 raids nationally
